languages.original_text: "Aeldari, your life among members of another species is a phenomenon that demands study. I wish to perform a cursory scan of your body to see how the effects of warp translation are affecting your flesh."

languages.text: "Эльдар, твоя жизнь среди представителей иного вида — феномен, требующий изучения. Я бы хотел провести беглое сканирование твоего тела, чтобы выяснить, как последствия варп-трансляций влияют на состояние плоти".

"Aeldari, your life among members of another species is a phenomenon that demands study. I wish to perform a cursory scan of your body to see how the effects of warp translation are affecting your flesh."
languages.original_text: "Эльдар, твоя жизнь среди представителей иного вида — феномен, требующий изучения. Я бы хотел провести беглое сканирование твоего тела, чтобы выяснить, как последствия варп-трансляций влияют на состояние плоти".

traits.locale_text: "Aeldari, your life among members of another species is a phenomenon that demands study. I wish to perform a cursory scan of your body to see how the effects of warp translation are affecting your flesh."

"Aeldari, your life among members of another species is a phenomenon that demands study. I wish to perform a cursory scan of your body to see how the effects of warp translation are affecting your flesh."

"Aeldari, your life among members of another species is a phenomenon that demands study. I wish to perform a cursory scan of your body to see how the effects of warp translation are affecting your flesh."

languages.text: «Aeldari, tu vida entre miembros de otra especie es un fenómeno digno de estudio. Me gustaría realizar un escaneo rutinario de tu cuerpo para estudiar los efectos de viajar por la disformidad sobre tu carne».
languages.original_text: "Aeldari, your life among members of another species is a phenomenon that demands study. I wish to perform a cursory scan of your body to see how the effects of warp translation are affecting your flesh."

traits.locale_text: «Aeldari, tu vida entre miembros de otra especie es un fenómeno digno de estudio. Me gustaría realizar un escaneo rutinario de tu cuerpo para estudiar los efectos de viajar por la disformidad sobre tu carne».

languages.text: 「アエルダリよ、別の種の者たちに囲まれて生きるあなたの暮らしは、研究を要する現象です。〈歪み〉の転移があなたの肉体にどのような影響を及ぼしているのか、ざっと走査させていただきたいのです」
languages.original_text: "Aeldari, your life among members of another species is a phenomenon that demands study. I wish to perform a cursory scan of your body to see how the effects of warp translation are affecting your flesh."

traits.locale_text: 「アエルダリよ、別の種の者たちに囲まれて生きるあなたの暮らしは、研究を要する現象です。〈歪み〉の転移があなたの肉体にどのような影響を及ぼしているのか、ざっと走査させていただきたいのです」

languages.text: “艾达灵族，你与非同族的物种混居在一起，这一现象值得研究。我希望能对你的身体进行一次粗略扫描，以观察亚空间跃迁如何影响你的血肉。”
languages.original_text: "Aeldari, your life among members of another species is a phenomenon that demands study. I wish to perform a cursory scan of your body to see how the effects of warp translation are affecting your flesh."

traits.locale_text: “艾达灵族，你与非同族的物种混居在一起，这一现象值得研究。我希望能对你的身体进行一次粗略扫描，以观察亚空间跃迁如何影响你的血肉。”

languages.text: "Aeldari, Euer Leben mit Mitgliedern anderer Spezies ist ein Phänomen, das es zu erforschen gilt. Ich würde gerne Euren Körper scannen, um zu sehen, ob sich die Effekte der Warptranslation auf Euer Fleisch auswirken."
languages.original_text: "Aeldari, your life among members of another species is a phenomenon that demands study. I wish to perform a cursory scan of your body to see how the effects of warp translation are affecting your flesh."

traits.locale_text: "Aeldari, Euer Leben mit Mitgliedern anderer Spezies ist ein Phänomen, das es zu erforschen gilt. Ich würde gerne Euren Körper scannen, um zu sehen, ob sich die Effekte der Warptranslation auf Euer Fleisch auswirken."

languages.text: « Aeldari, la vie que vous menez parmi les membres d'une autre espèce est un phénomène qui mérite d'être étudié. J'aimerais procéder à un examen sommaire afin d'observer les effets de la transition warp sur votre corps. »
languages.original_text: "Aeldari, your life among members of another species is a phenomenon that demands study. I wish to perform a cursory scan of your body to see how the effects of warp translation are affecting your flesh."

traits.locale_text: « Aeldari, la vie que vous menez parmi les membres d'une autre espèce est un phénomène qui mérite d'être étudié. J'aimerais procéder à un examen sommaire afin d'observer les effets de la transition warp sur votre corps. »

languages.text: "Aeldari, senin başka bir türün üyeleri arasında yaşaman incelenmesi gereken bir fenomen. Öteboyut yolculuğunun bedenini nasıl etkilediğini görmek için kısa bir tarama yapmak istiyorum."
languages.original_text: "Aeldari, your life among members of another species is a phenomenon that demands study. I wish to perform a cursory scan of your body to see how the effects of warp translation are affecting your flesh."

traits.locale_text: "Aeldari, senin başka bir türün üyeleri arasında yaşaman incelenmesi gereken bir fenomen. Öteboyut yolculuğunun bedenini nasıl etkilediğini görmek için kısa bir tarama yapmak istiyorum."
